description.unified: Naila dashes toward the enemy 2 times. The first attack moves behind the target, dealing ??? P.DMG and knocking it down for [1sec->3 sec]. The second attack moves behind the enemy with highest attack, dealing ??? P.DMG, knocking it down and increasing P.DMG they take by [20%->25%] for [4sec->10 sec].

Dispels negative effects from self, and casts [Wind Reading] to all allies for [7sec->15 sec], increasing their ATK by ??? and P.Dodge by [300->250]. If an ally under [Wind Reading] successfully dodges an attack, their Crit DMG increases by [2%->5%] for [7sec->20 sec]. The Crit DMG Boost effect can be stacked up to max 10 times.
Attacks nearby enemies in a circular range of self, dealing ??? P.DMG and stunning them for [1.8sec->3 sec]. When using this Skill, [800->500] DEF Penetration is increased.

Increases Naila's DEF Penetration by [(added) 150] and DEF by [(added) ???]. Normal attacks and Skill attacks ignore target's DMG Reduction effect. Also, her normal attacks have a [20%->15%] chance to deal ??? P.DMG and stunning them for [0.5sec->1 sec][(removed) 15% Physical DMG taken/5sec].

dark.unified: Increases P.DMG the target takes by 25% for 10 sec.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by 1 and dispels positive effects of all enemies upon activation.

dark.unified: Reduces Heal Rate of the hit target by [20%->40%] for [7 sec->10 sec].

light.unified: DMG of normal attacks increases by 25% and reduces cooldown of all skills by 2 sec.

dark.unified: At the beginning of each battle, own DEF Penetration increases by 400 for [10 sec->20 sec]. When activated in Guild Battle, upon activation during Guild War, gains immunity to CC for [5 sec->10 sec]. The DEF Penetration Boost effect is irremovable.

description.unified: [Fierce Winds] Increases DMG by 50%, and reduces Mana by {0} upon Critical Hit.
[Wind Reading] All effects become irremovable and upon activation, recovers own HP equal to {0}% of Max HP.
[Dive Bomb] Reduces Mana cost by 1 and increases DMG by {0}%.
[Tornado Strike] Increases chance of dealing additional DMG by [5%->10%] and upon activation during [(removed) Hero] Guild War, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of target's max HP.

dark.unified: Upon a Critical Hit, increases own ATK by 3% and P.Dodge by [35->30] for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.

description.unified: Upon Crittical Hit, increases P.DMG the target takes by {0}% for 10 sec and reduce CC Resist by {1}. If the target is a Boss, Naila deals {2}% increased DMG. The DMG Boost effect against Bosses can be stacked up to max 10 times.
